traits.name: Animate Boulders (1/Day)
traits.text: The galeb duhr magically animates up to two boulders it can see within 60 feet of it. A boulder has statistics like those of a galeb duhr, except it has Intelligence 1 and Charisma 1, it can't be charmed or frightened, and it lacks this action option. A boulder remains animated as long as the galeb duhr maintains concentration, up to 1 minute (as if concentration on a spell).

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.text: While the galeb duhr remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal boulder.
